x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Verification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Matches presented payments (e.g., checks) against a customer-issued file containing approved payment details (check number, date, amount, payee).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Detection Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies mismatches between presented payments and the authorized list. Flags these as exceptions for review.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Handling Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Allows the customer to approve, reject, or review flagged transactions before processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud Prevention Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Allows the customer to approve, reject, or review flagged transactions before processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Audit Trail Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides detailed reports of matched, unmatched, and rejected transactions for transparency and compliance.
